Short CV

Simge ARKAN ÖZDEMİR graduated from the Biology Department of Istanbul University in 2012. Having completed her master's degree in Basic and Industrial Microbiology at Istanbul University, ÖZDEMİR continues her doctorate education in the same field at Istanbul University.
